headline: Primary entry surfaces now stay quieter during active reading: note prompts wait until scrolling actually pauses, the floating note button defaults to a more compact presence on entry screens and mobile, and the overall support layer feels calmer while still staying available when needed.
notes: Waits for a short scroll pause before showing the floating note prompt so it does not pop in mid-read on home, magazine, and My Trips.
Keeps the note CTA compact by default on entry surfaces and small screens so support stays available without taking over the reading rhythm.
Preserves the deeper-reading thresholds and quieter launch/support surface while making the last public-facing layer feel steadier.
